prompt: Ground the synthetic-eccentricity seeding policy parameters (seeded-e cap, seed distribution shape) — author the Mode B self-contained research prompt file; do not run the research.

assertions.text: Prompt file has all five Mode B sections: Task, Context (do-not-re-derive), Research angles, Synthesis question, Method requirements
Task section states the evidence standard: the report must carry numbers, bibcodes, and short verbatim quotes — not just conclusions — because the consuming session acts from the report alone
Method requirements enforce the ADS discipline: ADS_API_TOKEN queries, no WebSearch, no citing numbers from WebFetch summaries, every claim pinned to bibcode/arXiv id
Candidate anchor papers (if any) are framed as to-be-ADS-verified starting points, not a dictated final list
Prompt includes an explicit 'if the literature is silent, say so' escape hatch instead of forcing a grounded-looking answer
Synthesis question demands a recommended value plus an acceptable range and trade-offs, and includes a sanity check against project data (db/ or stability-sim)
Context section is accurate to the repo: guardrails (measured e untouched, DB immutable, cfg-layer only, e<=0.05 provisional, REBOUND stability check, seeded marker) are represented
assertions.note: checked against the synthetic-eccentricity concept memory and repo docs

assertions.text: Output is an English .md file and stayed inside the workspace outputs dir (did not write into plans/ or docs/)
